news_national.summary: All midterms are not the same.

news_national.title: Inside the legal challenges to Trump’s agenda: Join the live discussion
news_national.summary: Federal judges are newly blocking President Trump’s moves on immigration, national parks and his $1.776 billion “anti-weaponization” fund. Join The Hill legal affairs reporters Zach Schonfeld and Sophie Brams as they chat with Democracy Forward President and CEO Skye Perryman, whose group brought all three of those cases and has been one of the most…

news_national.title: Watch live: Top Democrats speak out on Clayton nomination delay
news_national.author: The Hill staff
news_national.summary: Senate Democratic Leader Chuck Schumer (N.Y.), Senate Intelligence Committee Vice Chair Mark Warner (Va.) and other Democrats on the panel are scheduled to hold a press conference Wednesday afternoon after President Trump delayed the confirmation process for Jay Clayton. Trump had selected Clayton, a federal prosecutor, to be director of national intelligence, but the president…

news_national.title: Top Senate Democrat knocks ‘chaos and confusion’ from White House over delayed Clayton nomination
news_national.author: Max Rego
news_national.summary: Sen. Mark Warner (D-Va.) sharply criticized President Trump on Wednesday for delaying the nomination of Jay Clayton to be director of national intelligence (DNI).  “What we’re witnessing is an extraordinary display of dysfunction from a president who seems determined to turn America’s national security into a political bargaining chip,” Warner, the top Democrat on the…

news_national.title: Live updates: Trump suggests US inflicted up to $2 trillion in damage on Iran as G7 wraps
news_national.author: The Hill staff
news_national.summary: President Trump is addressing the Group of Seven (G7) summit, the Iran deal and more at a press conference Wednesday in France. Earlier, Trump cautioned that the preliminary deal with Iran isn’t yet final, and the U.S. could “resume strikes” if needed. “No, it’s not final. It’s a memorandum of understanding, and if I don’t…

news_national.title: Congress should act to care for veterans before the election
news_national.author: Kelly Merkel, opinion contributor
news_national.summary: Congress has the opportunity to honor veterans by passing the Take Care of America's Veterans Act, which would improve access to mental health care, increase transparency, and modernize the VA system.

news_national.title: JD Vance pressed on ‘The View’ over Trump immigration policies
news_national.author: Lindsey Granger, opinion contributor
news_national.summary: It's one thing to defend a policy. It's another to defend the real-world consequences of that policy when the facts, statistics and human stories are pushing back.

news_national.title: Pentagon AI chief: Musk’s Grok chatbot used to launch thousands of missiles at Iran
news_national.author: Ashleigh Fields
news_national.summary: The Pentagon artificial intelligence chief on Monday said Elon Musk’s Grok chatbot is tantamount to national security in a sworn statement that noted xAI’s technology has been used throughout the Iran war.  Cameron Stanley, the chief digital and artificial intelligence officer for the Department of Defense, wrote that the chatbot “enabled U.S. forces to deploy…

news_national.title: Colleges know public trust has plummeted, and leaders are seeking a fix
news_national.author: Susan Svrluga
news_national.summary: After a year of intense political pressure, higher education heads are speaking openly about rising concerns.

news_national.title: Drivers rush to help after private jet crashes on highway, killing 1 person
news_national.author: Victoria Craw
news_national.summary: The Austin-bound plane was carrying six people when it crashed on a highway near Laredo, Texas. Videos show it striking a lamppost and a car, and snapping in half.

news_national.title: These 3 shelter dogs won a makeover contest for their dramatic transformations
news_national.author: Kyle Melnick
news_national.summary: “She went from barely surviving to truly thriving,” a rescuer said of her Havanese, who won the top prize.

news_national.title: DOJ charges 15 in Minnesota with conspiracy to block ICE, claims antifa ties
news_national.author: Molly Hennessy-Fiske
news_national.summary: Federal prosecutors alleged that the 15 people were “conspiring to impede or injure federal officers” during the Trump administration’s immigration enforcement operation in Minneapolis earlier this year.

news_national.title: Death of woman released by ICE on a winter day is now ruled a homicide
news_national.author: Arelis R. Hernández
news_national.summary: Security footage shows Daphy Michel, a 31-year-old asylum seeker from Haiti, sitting on a bus stop bench for days in cold temperatures.

news_national.title: On a ‘beautiful day for jumping,’ a plane of skydivers plummets to the ground
news_national.author: Annie Gowen, Todd Frankel
news_national.summary: Sunday's plane crash ripped a hole in the close-knit community of skydivers in the Midwest: adventure seekers who bonded over the adrenaline they get with every jump.

news_national.title: Anti-Islam candidate loses mayor’s race in Texas city torn over immigration
news_national.author: Molly Hennessy-Fiske
news_national.summary: The mayoral election in fast-growing Frisco was seen as a rejection of anti-Islamic rhetoric that has become prevalent among the state GOP.

news_ktn.title: Breaking News: Senate postpones intelligence chief hearing after Trump derails confirmation process
news_ktn.author: 0101019ed69760bb-01ffe6e7-31d6-4487-9c3f-d4e228dc89da-000000@us-west-2.washingtonpost.com (0101019ed69760bb-01ffe6e7-31d6-4487-9c3f-d4e228dc89da-000000@us-west-2.washingtonpost.com)
news_ktn.summary:
Alert from The Washington Post

GOP Sen. Tom Cotton had pledged to continue as scheduled with the hearing Wednesday, but later said that the president had “directed Jay Clayton not to appear.” Clayton was nominated to serve as director of national intelligence, replacing acting director and MAGA loyalist Bill Pulte.

‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ 
Sign up for alerts
 

Breaking News

June 17, 1:17 p.m. EDT
 

Senate postpones intelligence chief hearing after Trump derails confirmation process

GOP Sen. Tom Cotton had pledged to continue as scheduled with the hearing Wednesday, but later said that the president had “directed Jay Clayton not to appear.” Clayton was nominated to serve as director of national intelligence, replacing acting director and MAGA loyalist Bill Pulte.
Read more

news_ktn.title: Breaking News: Inside a behind-the-scenes push to keep RFK Jr.’s vaccine agenda alive
news_ktn.author: 0100019ed62ac963-13f70a4a-014d-465e-9305-5129fa21ecf5-000000@email.washingtonpost.com (0100019ed62ac963-13f70a4a-014d-465e-9305-5129fa21ecf5-000000@email.washingtonpost.com)
news_ktn.summary:
Alert from The Washington Post

The public effort to revamp U.S. vaccine policy has quieted. Out of the public eye, it’s a different story.

‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ 
Sign up for alerts
 

Breaking News

June 17, 11:18 a.m. EDT
 

Inside a behind-the-scenes push to keep RFK Jr.’s vaccine agenda alive

The public effort to revamp U.S. vaccine policy has quieted. Out of the public eye, it’s a different story.

Tropical Storm Arthur formed in the Gulf just off the coast of Texas Wednesday morning, according to the National Hurricane Center. Arthur is the first named storm of the 2026 Atlantic hurricane season.

News Alert: CNN obtains US-Iran agreement

The agreement between Iran and the US lays out the terms of the ceasefire between the bitter rivals, the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, some financial relief for Iran and a reiteration from Tehran that it will never produce a nuclear weapon, according to a copy of the text obtained by CNN.
